test-method.name: testSiteHealthCheck
test-method.description: GET / – verify the site is reachable and returns HTTP 200

test-method.name: testValidLoginReturnsRedirectOrOk
test-method.description: POST /login with valid credentials must produce a redirect (302) or 200

test-method.name: testInvalidUsernameReturnsError
test-method.description: POST /login with invalid username must return an error body

exception.full-stacktrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Expected HTTP 200, got 404 Body:

Not Found

test-method.name: testInvalidPasswordReturnsError
test-method.description: POST /login with invalid password must return an error body

exception.full-stacktrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Expected HTTP 200, got 404 Body:

Not Found

test-method.name: testEmptyCredentialsHandledGracefully
test-method.description: POST /login with empty credentials must be handled gracefully

test-method.name: testLoginResponseTimeSLA
test-method.description: POST /login must respond within the 5000ms SLA

test-method.name: testResponseHeadersPresent
test-method.description: GET / must include a valid Content-Type header

test-method.name: testSuccessfulLogin
test-method.description: Valid credentials should redirect to secure area with success flash

test-method.name: testSuccessFlashMessageContent
test-method.description: Success flash message text and CSS class must match expected values

test-method.name: testInvalidUsername
test-method.description: Invalid username should show error flash

test-method.name: testInvalidPassword
test-method.description: Invalid password should show error flash

test-method.name: testEmptyUsername
test-method.description: Empty username field should produce an error

test-method.name: testEmptyPassword
test-method.description: Empty password field should produce an error

test-method.name: testSqlInjectionAttempt
test-method.description: SQL injection attempt should be rejected safely

test-method.name: testSelfHealingLocatorFallback
test-method.description: SelfHealingLocator must fall back gracefully when the primary selector is removed from the DOM at runtime

test-method.name: testPageTitle
test-method.description: Login page must have the expected page title

test-method.name: testInputFieldsAreInteractable
test-method.description: Username and password inputs must be interactable

test-method.name: testSuccessfulFileUpload
test-method.description: Upload a .txt document and confirm the filename in the response

test-method.name: testUploadPageAccessibleAfterLogin
test-method.description: Upload page should be accessible immediately after login

test-method.name: testDynamicContentLoading
test-method.description: Trigger a dynamically-loaded element – simulates async KYC status update

test-method.description: File input element must be present and enabled on the upload page

test-method.name: testSubmitWithoutFileHandlesGracefully
test-method.description: Submitting without a file should not crash the application
